notes: v2.4.0 — Sync ingest performance pass: child-table writes via executemany; bleach Cleaner pre-compiled and reused instead of rebuilt per record; FTS5 deferred indexing on Full Sync (drop triggers, bulk write, rebuild once); SHA-256 source_hash on vulns lets Delta sync short-circuit unchanged QIDs entirely. Init_db hardening: threat_backfill_done marker stops re-walking 40K+ legacy rows on every container start; backfill streams via fetchmany() with per-batch commits and progress logging. Backfill Missing button hidden during active sync. Reference-environment performance section added to docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.

steps.comment: Update dependency list FIRST so pip install works
Install dependencies BEFORE replacing code — prevents import errors on reload
Replace entire app/ directory with new code (deps already installed)
Update entrypoint with self-heal logic for next restart
Ensure entrypoint is executable after copy
Update the manifest itself for future updates
Save version SHA and restart Gunicorn workers
